## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.11

### Cameras
- Exposes direct recording and snapshot links on camera Motion events when X-Sense reports APK playback URLs.
- Updates the included camera event blueprint so the default notification can include recording and snapshot links without custom YAML.
- Keeps the native Home Assistant WebRTC live stream path unchanged from the previous prerelease.

### Devices
- Reads SWS51 leak detector details from the SBS50 child-device info shadow used by the Android app.
- Adds coverage for SWS51 wet/dry, mute, and battery-style payload fields from the APK-aligned path.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the dynamic blueprint variables, direct recording URL event data, and SWS51 SBS50 child info path.
- Confirms the WebRTC candidate-order guard still passes with this prerelease.
